REPLY BRIEF IN SUPPORT OF PLTF HENRY KLEINSCHMIDT'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER DISCVOERY RESPONSES, DOCUMENT PRODUCTION AND REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF KLEINSCHMIDT, HENRY

RESPONSE TO PLTF'S SEPARAT STATEMENT INS UPPORT OFMOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER DISCOVERY RESPONSES, DOCUMENT PRODUCTION, AND REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANXCTIONS FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

DISCOVERY 610, PLAINTIFF HENRY KLEINSCHMIDT'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER DISCOVERY RESPONSES AND DOCUMENT PRODUCTION IS GRANTED AS TO FORM INTERROGATORIES 12.2 AND 12.3. AS TO REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION NO. 1, THE MOTION IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. AS THAT REQUEST WOULD REQUIRE PRODUCTION OF THE DOCUMENTS IDENTIFIED IN RESPONSE TO INTERROGATORIES 12.2 AND 12.3, THE IDENTIFICATION OF THOSE DOCUMENTS AND THE PRIVILEGES BEING ASSERTED IS ALL THAT IS REQUIRED. DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO RESPOND FURTHER WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT. NOT REPORTED.
ARBITRATOR KEVIN JAIME GRAY APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION JUN-21-2010 THROUGH SEP-19-2010.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Disocvery Responses, Document Production, And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar May-26-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Arthur J. Harris, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: HENRY KLEINSCHMIDT
David W. Ammons, DCA, for Defendant and opposing party: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF HENRY KLEINSCHMIDT's Motion To Compel Further Discovery Responses and Document Production is granted as to Form Interrogatories 12.2 and 12.3. As to Request For Production No. 1, the motion is granted in part and denied in part. As that request would require production of the documents identified in response to Interrogatories 12.2 and 12.3, the identification of those documents and the privileges being asserted is all that is required. Defendant is ordered to respond further within 15 days of notice of this order. Plaintiff's request for sanctions is denied. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-19-2010 Assigned To Arbitration On Jun-07-10; Pre-Arbitration Settlement Conference On Jul-20-10 At 11:00 A.M.
